FlyPix / Change intelligence
Before · 412 buildingsAfter · 267 buildings

See the full picture

Measure change,
not just pixels.

Run the same model across captures from different dates. FlyPix counts what remained, identifies what disappeared, and measures the affected area after a fire, flood, or construction event.

01Before: 412 buildings · 86.4 ha

02After: 267 buildings · 59.1 ha

03Damage: 145 buildings · 27.3 ha

FlyPix / Automated review

Manual annotate

Time spent: 997 sec

AI annotate

Time spent: 3 sec

From hours to seconds

Save 99.7% of your review time.

AI pre-annotates every visible object across the scene. Your team verifies the result instead of tracing each object by hand.

One connected workflow

From imagery
to action.

Bring your data, define what matters, train a model, and move verified results into the tools your team already uses.
